description: Gets detailed information for an image. Images are specified with either an imageTag or imageDigest.
mitreAttackTechniques: T1530 - Data from Cloud Storage Object

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.technique: T1537 - Transfer Data to Cloud Account
unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: Container images pulled via BatchGetImage can be saved as archives and exfiltrated, transferring proprietary code and secrets out of the environment.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.technique: T1552.001 - Unsecured Credentials: Credentials In Files
unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: Docker images may contain hardcoded credentials, API keys, or configuration files with sensitive information embedded in image layers.

securityImplications: Attackers might use BatchGetImage (triggered by docker pull) to exfiltrate private container images containing proprietary application code, embedded secrets, and internal configuration.
